title: E-commerce Product Showcase

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: E-commerce Product Showcase

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g transform='translate(0, 0)'>
  <rect x='50' y='50' width='300' height='200' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD' />
  <text x='130' y='120' font-size='24' fill='#C06C88'>Product Title</text>
  <text x='130' y='160' font-size='18' fill='#C06C88'>$99.99</text>
  <g transform='translate(220, 180)'>
    <g>
      <path d='M0 0h10v10H0z' fill='#C06C88' /> <path d='M10 0h10v10H10z' fill='#C06C88' />
      <path d='M0 10h10v10H0z' fill='#C06C88' /> <path d='M0 20h10v10H0z' fill='#C06C88' />
    </g>
    <text x='0' y='-10' font-size='12' fill='#C06C88'>99</text>
    <text x='20' y='-10' font-size='12' fill='#C06C88'>99</text>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(220, 140)'>
    <rect fill='#411C56' width='16' height='16' rx='8' />
    <g transform='translate(8, 8)'>
      <path d='M2 2h2v2h-2z' fill='#C06C88' />
      <path d='M6 2h2v2h-2z' fill='#C06C88' />
    </g>
  </g>
  <rect x='290' y='50' width='60' height='40' rx='10' fill='#C06C88' >
    <animateMotion path='M290 90L320 90 320 130 290 130' dur='4s' repeatCount='indefinite' />
  </rect>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates
The heart icon and price toggle must change color on hover

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: E-commerce Product Showcase

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, heart icon toggle, and price toggle functionality.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
